name: MITRAL REGURGITATION
definition: MITRAL INSUFFICIENCY most common manifestation of mitral valve dysfunction of any component (mitral valve
discriminating_features: early closure of aortic valve (LV stroke volume partially lost to LA)

general: early closure of aortic valve (LV stroke volume partially lost to LA)
left atrial enlargement (in chronic MV insufficiency)
bulging of interatrial septum to the right during systole
pulmonary venous hypertension with engorged pulmonary vessels and cephalization (less
asymmetric right upper lobe edema (9%) ← preferential flow of regurgitant jet into
enlarged LA appendage (with history of previous rheumatic heart disease)

clinical.Rx: surgical valve repair / replacement (if LV ejection fraction < 60% / LV end-systolic
